evals.name: khew-iac
evals.prompt: Generate the YouTube metadata for the Khew Jia Peng talk in projects/jb-agentic-meetup/talk-recordings/JBAgentic-20260530-meetup-1-KhewJiaPeng-AIMeetsInfrastructure.
evals.expected_output: youtube-content.md in the talk folder: 3 A/B titles (distinct angles, <=70 chars incl. ' | JB Agentic Meetup #1'), description with 0:00-anchored chapters + verbatim community blurb/links, tags (<500 chars), category Science & Technology.

evals.name: kowa-journey
evals.prompt: Prep Kowa Jia Liang's talk for upload — I need youtube titles, description and tags. Folder: projects/jb-agentic-meetup/talk-recordings/JBAgentic-20260530-meetup-1-KowaJiaLiang-OurAIJourney
evals.expected_output: youtube-content.md in the talk folder with the same structure and invariants; titles reflect the manual-coding -> Claude Code journey.

evals.expected_output: youtube-content.md in the talk folder with the same structure and invariants; titles reflect the Telegram expense agent + MCP build.
